title: Refresh embedding-search skill for current Prometheus runtime assumptions
summary: Modernize embedding-search content, remove stale naming/assumptions, and align implementation guidance to current local stack expectations.
details:
Update `skills/embedding-search/SKILL.md` to remove legacy references and clarify supported runtime patterns.

Scope:
1. Remove all legacy SmallClaw naming/path assumptions.
2. Rework examples to be stack-agnostic with Prometheus-preferred local execution guidance.
3. Clarify when this skill should be selected vs other document/data skills.
4. Add/strengthen trigger list for semantic search/RAG prompts.
5. Include explicit caveats for dependency/tooling choices to reduce stale execution paths.

Acceptance:
- No legacy naming remains.
- Trigger and boundaries are explicit.
- Skill remains focused on embeddings/semantic retrieval workflows.

affectedFiles.description: Modernize content, triggers, and runtime assumptions.

diffPreview:
- Legacy SmallClaw-era assumptions and ambiguous tool/runtime cues.
+ Prometheus-aligned wording, clearer triggers, and current semantic-search workflow boundaries.
estimatedImpact: Improves routing accuracy and reduces stale guidance for RAG/embedding tasks.
executorPrompt: Edit `skills/embedding-search/SKILL.md` to remove legacy references, modernize runtime assumptions, and tighten triggers/boundaries for semantic search and RAG requests. Keep scope strictly on embedding search workflows. Return a short before/after summary plus final trigger list.
